title: AI_OS Packet Dashboard Read Model
description: Foundation schema stub for display-safe packet summaries used by dashboards and operator views.

schema.description: Identifies this object as a dashboard-safe packet read model.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this read-model schema contract.

display_severity.description: Dashboard severity such as INFO, REVIEW, WARNING, BLOCKED, or UNKNOWN.

next_safe_action.description: Operator-safe next action shown in the UI.
